description: Core metadata for an OpenTelemetry Collector component.

id.description: Unique identifier for the component (e.g., core-receiver-otlpreceiver).

name.description: The short name of the component (e.g., otlpreceiver).

ecosystem.description: The ecosystem this component belongs to (always 'collector').

type.description: The functional type of the component.

distribution.description: The distribution where this component originates.

description.description: Brief description of the component's functionality.

repository.description: Link to the component's source code or documentation.

status.description: Detailed status including codeowners and signal stability.

class.description: Functional types this component supports (e.g., as a receiver, processor).

stability.description: Stability levels per telemetry signal (metrics, logs, traces).

metrics.description: Telemetry metrics emitted by this component. Keyed by metric name.

additionalProperties.description:
A single metric emitted by a Collector component.
Modeled after the metadata.yaml schema used by the collector-contrib repo.

description.description: Description of what this metric measures.

enabled.description: Whether the metric is collected by default.

unit.description: Metric unit as defined by https://ucum.org/ucum.html.

stability.description: Stability level of this specific metric.

optional.description: Whether this metric is optional (only initialized under certain conditions).

sum.description: Sum metric type descriptor. Present when the metric is a sum.

allOf.description: Shared fields across sum, gauge, and histogram metric type descriptors.

value_type.description: The numeric type of the metric's data points.

aggregation_temporality.description: Aggregation temporality (e.g., "cumulative", "delta"). Only present on sum metrics.

async.description: Whether this metric is observed asynchronously.

gauge.description: Gauge metric type descriptor. Present when the metric is a gauge.

value_type.description: The numeric type of the metric's data points.

aggregation_temporality.description: Aggregation temporality (e.g., "cumulative", "delta"). Only present on sum metrics.

async.description: Whether this metric is observed asynchronously.

histogram.description: Histogram metric type descriptor. Present when the metric is a histogram.

allOf.description: Shared fields across sum, gauge, and histogram metric type descriptors.

value_type.description: The numeric type of the metric's data points.

aggregation_temporality.description: Aggregation temporality (e.g., "cumulative", "delta"). Only present on sum metrics.

async.description: Whether this metric is observed asynchronously.

attributes.description: Attribute keys referencing the component-level attributes map.
Attribute definitions referenced by metrics. Keyed by attribute name.

additionalProperties.description:
Attribute definition at the component level.
Metrics reference these by key name in their `attributes` array.

name_override.description: If set, the exported attribute name differs from the map key.

enum.description: Allowed values when the attribute is an enum.

resource_attributes.description: Resource attributes associated with the component. Keyed by attribute name.

additionalProperties.description:
Attribute definition at the component level.
Metrics reference these by key name in their `attributes` array.

name_override.description: If set, the exported attribute name differs from the map key.

enum.description: Allowed values when the attribute is an enum.

markdown_hash.description: Content hash of the component's README, if one was found. Used to lazily fetch the markdown file.
